text:
the Hrinchs , also known as Morglutzians , are a species of blue, two eye-stalked aliens that inhabit the planet Morglutz.

Hrinchs are bipedal, eye-stalked humanoid creatures with nipples on their elbows and many of the Hrinchs lick the nipples of other Hrinchs as a form of pleasure. The Hrinchs make their first appearance in "Interdimensional Cable 2: Tempting Fate" but only have a major role in "A Rickconvenient Mort". They are partying because Morglutz's home star is going supernova. Their species is presumably extinct with the exception of Daphne who stowed away with Rick Sanchez and Summer Smith and now lives on Ferkus 9.
